title: stop verify evidence goal_verify regression
purpose: A4.2 defines stop verify evidence goal verify regression for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified.
scope: Owns `A4.2` only; siblings under `A4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §3 — Branch A — Pursuit & control plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#3-branch-a-pursuit-control-plane).
behavior_steps: When preflight finds missing task evidence (`evidence_required` true but paths absent), [G1.1](G1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) or verify-router exit non-zero, `goal_verify_command` failure, or [G2.4](G2.4-goal-verify-regression-every-implement-batch.md) regression, check-pipeline-blocked emits stop class `verify:*` and exits the [A2.6](A2.6-loop-until-blocked-budget-achieved-h3-reject.md) loop without advancing `next_action`.

Journal-keeper dual-writes the failed command, missing evidence paths, and `last_verify=failed` to journal and state.json so resumed pursuit or the operator knows exactly what to fix—fail-closed, no silent retry loop.

Task-level verify failures block implement task completion; goal-level failures block [A2.5](A2.5-goal-verify-pass-transition-h3-pending.md) H3 pending transition per [G2.3](G2.3-goal-verify-blocks-h3-until-pass.md), preventing false achieved states that would reach H3 without proof.

This stop class connects Plane A pursuit to Plane G verification—it is distinct from resource exhaustion ([A4.3](A4.3-stop-resource-max-steps-max-cost-lease-expired.md)) and state corruption ([A4.4](A4.4-stop-integrity-validate-workflow-state-corrupt.md)).
If verify stops fire but evidence later passes on re-run, pursuit resumes only after preflight confirms all required proof paths exist—never auto-clearing H2 without successful verifier output.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
goal_verify passes but H3 rejected â€” goal.state returns to pursuing with rejection notes.
Edge case `A4.2` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `A4.2`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Add `goal` block to state template and journal-keeper dual-write (v2.14).
Implement `scripts/goal-verify.py` stub aggregating task evidence paths.
Document `A4.2` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `A4.2`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: A4.2 defines stop verify evidence goal verify regression for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified. In practice, the system when preflight finds missing task evidence (`evidence_required` true but paths absent), [g1.1](g1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) or verify-router exit non-zero, `goal_verify_command` failure, or [g2.4](g2.4-goal-verify-regression-every-implement-batch.md) regression, check-pipeline-blocked emits stop class `verify:*` and exits the [a2.6](a2.6-loop-until-blocked-budget-achieved-h3-reject.md) loop without advancing `next_action`, then journal-keeper dual-writes the failed command, missing evidence paths, and `last_verify=failed` to journal and state.json so resumed pursuit or the operator knows exactly what to fix—fail-closed, no silent retry loop.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-a 2026-06-28 -->

Verification stops protect quality when evidence or goal-level proof fails. Task evidence missing, `verify-router` failure, goal_verify regression, or conformance script exit non-zero all produce a hard stop with structured H2—not a silent retry loop.

Fail-closed behavior prevents false “achieved” states that would reach H3 without proof. The conductor records which command failed and which evidence paths were absent so the operator or a resumed pursuit knows exactly what to fix. This stop class connects Plane A to Plane G; it is distinct from resource exhaustion (A4.3) and integrity corruption (A4.4).
